props.ChoiceText: Your work reached high hands, where quality mattered, but favor, presentation, and pleasing the wrong eye mattered more than you expected.
props.ChoiceBio: A court commission taught you how close workmanship can come to power, and how exposed it becomes when power is watching.

0.TransitionText: Because a court commission taught you how close workmanship can come to power, your life stayed with tools, labor, and the discipline of making things well.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Craftsman, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a court commission taught you how close workmanship can come to power, workmanship lifted into display, taste, and celebrated craft.
1.TransitionPrompt: Court work could draw you deeper into display and patronage. Will you follow it?

2.TransitionText: Because a court commission taught you how close workmanship can come to power, good work brought you close enough to favor that service began to matter as much as craft.
2.TransitionPrompt: Court work could also tie you more closely to favor and service. Will you follow it?
